'''Eisen Kerioth''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who as the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] of [[Doldur sector/Legends|Doldur sector]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He pioneered an effort to improve the effectiveness of [[Stormtrooper armor/Legends|stormtrooper armor]] in repelling [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] fire after he was injured by a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] attack. Following his injury, Kerioth walked with a limp and carried a distinctive [[Swagger stick/Legends|swagger stick]].<ref name="TOT" />
